title: More Cave Sounds
description: Diversifies the already existing cave sounds by adding even more cave sounds
body:
Showcase: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bhvtrVOWI2s&ab_channel=MoreCaveSounds

Adds more vanilla-like cave sounds alongside the already existing ones for better diversity and immersion.

Made this mostly for myself so I'm not sure how well it works with other versions but im guessing it should work since atleast 1.13.

CREDIT: https://youtube.com/@skexofiner.nsystemz?si=kbEAliCXRImUUGgA (creator of the sounds)
